{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = White Archlord madra
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[White Archlord madra]] can swallow an entire stage.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
